message.subject: This week in tech
message.body_text: This week in tech: our latest roundup published June 8, 2026. Top stories include new framework releases. Read the full issue online.

note: retail sale: offer-valid-through date sits next to the before risk word (high-confidence FP trap)

message.subject: Summer sale starts now
message.body_text: Summer sale! Save up to 40% storewide. Use code SUNNY at checkout. Offer valid through July 4, 2026. Shop now before your favorites sell out.

note: food delivery receipt: completed total is not an obligation

message.subject: Your order receipt
message.body_text: Thanks for your order! Your total was $31.47 including delivery and tip. Your receipt and order details are in the app. Rate your delivery experience.

note: social notification: sign-in CTA is engagement bait, not a life-admin action (action FP trap)

message.subject: You have new notifications
message.body_text: You have 3 new connection requests and 12 unread notifications waiting for you. People are viewing your profile. Sign in to see who.

message.subject: New this week
message.body_text: New this week: three documentaries we think you'll love. Start watching tonight. Your watchlist is waiting.

note: referral marketing: bonus amount and campaign end date are marketing

message.subject: Refer a friend, earn a bonus
message.body_text: Refer a friend and you could each earn a $200 bonus when they open a qualifying checking account by August 31, 2026. Terms apply.

note: survey invitation: complete is an optional engagement CTA (action FP trap)

message.subject: How did we do?
message.body_text: How did we do? Complete our 2-minute survey about your recent support experience and help us improve.

note: password changed confirmation: past timestamp, conditional support action not required

message.subject: Your password was changed
message.body_text: Your password was changed successfully on June 14, 2026 at 3:42 PM. If you did not make this change, contact support immediately.

note: shipping ETA: arrival estimate is not an obligation deadline

message.subject: Your order is on the way
message.body_text: Good news! Your order shipped and is expected to arrive by June 20, 2026. Track your package any time in the app.

note: work collaboration request: review CTA is not life-admin (action FP trap by domain)

message.subject: You were mentioned in a pull request
message.body_text: user-alpha mentioned you in a pull request: 'Can you review the migration script when you get a chance?' View the conversation online.

message.subject: Five quick weeknight dinners
message.body_text: Five quick weeknight dinners for the summer. Plus: our pantry checklist. Happy cooking!

note: charity match campaign: donation deadline next to before risk word (high-confidence FP trap)

message.subject: Double your impact
message.body_text: Your year-end gift can go twice as far: all donations made before December 31, 2026 will be matched dollar for dollar. Give today.

note: app release notes: update verb is outside the lexicon, clean negative

message.subject: What's new in version 8.2
message.body_text: What's new in version 8.2: improved search, dark mode refinements, and faster sync. Update from your device's app store.

note: hotel promo: nightly rate and booking deadline are marketing

message.subject: Weekend escape deals
message.body_text: Weekend escape: rooms from $129 per night at Lakeside Resort. Book by June 25, 2026 for late checkout perks.

note: workplace all-hands: corporate event is not life-admin; submit CTA is a domain FP trap

message.subject: Quarterly all-hands
message.body_text: Reminder: the quarterly all-hands is on July 1, 2026 at 10 AM in the main auditorium. Submit questions for leadership through the form.
